s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEAT POSITION SENSOR (for Power Seat)

s2.ptxt: Check that the ignition switch is off.
Check that the negative battery (-) cable is disconnected.

atten2.ptxt: Wait for 90 seconds after disconnecting the cable to prevent airbag deployment.

s2.ptxt: Engage the pin and install the seat position sensor to the seat slide position sensor protector as shown in the illustration.
Using a feeler gauge 1.5 mm (0.059 in.), temporarily install the seat position sensor.

item.ptxt: If the seat position sensor has been dropped, or there are any cracks, dents or other defects in the case or connector, replace the seat position sensor with a new one.
When installing the seat position sensor, be careful that the SRS wiring does not interfere with other parts and that it is not pinched between other parts.

atten4.ptxt: Be sure that a clearance between the seat position sensor and the seat rail is within 1.1 mm (0.043 in.) to 1.9 mm (0.075 in.).

s2.ptxt: Using a "torx" socket wrench (T30), tighten the "torx" screw to install the seat position sensor.
Make sure that a clearance between the seat position sensor and the seat rail is within 1.1 mm (0.043 in.) to 1.9 mm (0.075 in.).
Check that there is no looseness in the installation parts of the seat position sensor.
Connect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEAT POSITION SENSOR (for Manual Seat)

s2.ptxt: Check that the ignition switch is off.
Check that the negative battery (-) cable is disconnected.

atten2.ptxt: Wait for 90 seconds after disconnecting the cable to prevent airbag deployment.

s2.ptxt: Engage the pin and install the seat position sensor to the seat slide position sensor protector as shown in the illustration.
Using a feeler gauge 1.5 mm (0.059 in.), temporarily install the seat position sensor.

item.ptxt: If the seat position sensor has been dropped, or there are any cracks, dents or other defects in the case or connector, replace the seat position sensor with a new one.
When installing the seat position sensor, be careful that the SRS wiring does not interfere with other parts and that it is not pinched between other parts.

atten4.ptxt: Be sure that a clearance between the seat position sensor and the seat rail is within 1.1 mm (0.043 in.) to 1.9 mm (0.075 in.).

s2.ptxt: Using a "torx" socket wrench (T30), tighten the "torx" screw to install the seat position sensor.
Make sure that a clearance between the seat position sensor and the seat rail is within 1.1 mm (0.043 in.) to 1.9 mm (0.075 in.).
Check that there is no looseness in the installation parts of the seat position sensor.
Connect the connector.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEAT CUSHION SHIELD (for Manual Seat)
INSTALL RECLINING ADJUSTER RELEASE HANDLE (for Manual Seat)
INSTALL VERTICAL ADJUSTING HANDLE (for Manual Seat)
INSTALL VERTICAL ADJUSTER COVER (for Manual Seat)
INSTALL FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY LH (for Power Seat)

s2.ptxt: Place the seat in the cabin.
Connect the connectors under the seat.
Connect the cable to the negative (-) battery terminal.
Move the front seat assembly fully forward by operating the slide and vertical power seat switch knob.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the seat is locked.

s2.ptxt: Temporarily install the front side of the front seat assembly with the 2 bolts.
Move the front seat assembly fully forward by operating the slide and vertical power seat switch knob.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the seat is locked.

s2.ptxt: Temporarily install the rear side of the front seat assembly with the 2 bolts.
Move the front seat assembly to the rearmost position by operating the slide and vertical power seat switch knob.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the seat is locked.

s2.ptxt: Fully tighten the 2 bolts on the front side of the front seat assembly in the order of the inner side bolt and then the outer side bolt.
Move the front seat assembly fully forward by operating the slide and vertical power seat switch knob.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the seat is locked.

s2.ptxt: Fully tighten the 2 bolts on the rear side of the front seat assembly in the order of the inner side bolt and then the outer side bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY LH (for Manual Seat)

s2.ptxt: Place the front seat assembly in the vehicle and align the adjuster pin with the hole on the vehicle side.
Connect the connector and clamp.
Move the front seat assembly to the rearmost position by operating the slide handle.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the seat is locked.

s2.ptxt: Temporarily install the front seat track bracket with the 2 bolts.
Move the front seat assembly fully forward by operating the slide handle.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the seat is locked.

s2.ptxt: Temporarily install the rear seat track bracket with the 2 bolts.
Move the front seat assembly to the rearmost position by operating the slide handle.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the seat is locked.

s2.ptxt: Fully tighten the 2 bolts on the front seat track bracket in the order of the inner side bolt and then the outer side bolt.
Move the front seat assembly fully forward by operating the slide handle.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the seat is locked.

s2.ptxt: Fully tighten the 2 bolts on the rear seat track bracket in the order of the inner side bolt and then the outer side bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEAT TRACK COVER RH (for Power Seat)

s2.ptxt: Slide the inner seat track bracket cover along the seat rail toward the front of the vehicle. Engage claw A to the seat rail.
Push the inner seat track bracket cover to engage claw B.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INNER SEAT TRACK BRACKET COVER LH (for Manual Seat)

s2.ptxt: Slide the inner seat track bracket cover along the seat rail toward the front of the vehicle. Engage claw A to the seat rail.
Push the seat track bracket cover inner to engage claw B.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEAT TRACK COVER LH (for Power Seat)

s2.ptxt: Slide the seat track cover along the seat rail toward the front of the vehicle. Engage claw A to the seat rail.
Push the seat track cover to engage claw B.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEAT TRACK COVER LH (for Manual Seat)

s2.ptxt: Slide the seat track cover along the seat rail toward the front of the vehicle. Engage claw A to the seat rail.
Push the seat track cover to engage claw B.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Power Seat)
INSTALL FRONT SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Manual Seat)
CONNECT CABLE TO NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL (for Manual Seat)
INSPECT POWER SEAT OPERATION (for Power Seat)
INSPECT SLIDE ADJUSTER LOCK (for Manual Seat)
INSPECT SEAT HEATER OPERATION (w/ Seat Heater System)

s2.ptxt: Check the power seat operation.
Check the seat heater operation (with seat heater system).

s3.ptxt: Turn the seat heater switch ON.
Wait 5 minutes or more and confirm that the seat surface becomes warm.

s2.ptxt: Inspect the SRS warning light (See page ).
